scripts.migrate: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/migrate.js
scripts.validate-agent-config: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/validate-agent-config.js
scripts.validate-agent-standards: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/validate-agent-standards.js
scripts.validate-agent-release: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/validate-agent-release.js
scripts.publish-agent-release: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/publish-agent-release.js
scripts.publish-agent-runtime-release: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/publish-agent-runtime-release.js
scripts.validate-workflow-config: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/validate-workflow-config.js
scripts.publish-workflow-config: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/publish-workflow-config.js
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run compile && node --test dist/agent-config/manifest-loader.test.js dist/standards-config/manifest-loader.test.js dist/workflow-config/manifest-loader.test.js dist/workflow-config/publish.test.js
scripts.test:integration: corepack pnpm run compile && node --test --test-concurrency=1 dist/workflow-config/publish.integration.test.js dist/agent-runtime.integration.test.js dist/phase4.integration.test.js dist/phase5.integration.test.js dist/phase7-reference-repo.integration.test.js dist/integration-auth-plane.integration.test.js dist/phase6-runner-fabric.integration.test.js
